commit_scope: Add a live witness oracle emission ledger carrier with stale-state refusal.

commands: coord join && coord claim "witness oracle carrier ledger"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/champion-challenger.fk form-stdlib/colearning-retire.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/android-mesh-learning.fk form-stdlib/witness-state-receipt.fk form-stdlib/tests/witness-state-receipt-band.fk
local_validation.notes: The carrier compiles, focused tests pass, and the witness-state Form contract still returns 16777215 with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The live localhost witness probe wrote a blocked receipt because the Android stream was stale: present=false and both sampled cycles had seq=1522. That refusal is the intended behavior for non-live state.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this local carrier slice. Public pulse was breathing at start.

phase_gate.gate: Emission cycle records must be written from live witness counters and refuse stale state.
phase_gate.next: Install the oracle emission loop beside the macOS witness service and replace summary-label carriers with full STT/vision model-backed labels.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A local command now turns live witness /state summaries into source-backed oracle emission ledger records. Active states write pass records with increasing cycles; stale/non-live states write blocked receipts and exit non-zero.
test_flows: Two active witness state objects produce increasing native-witness-export cycles with running non-fixture oracle process rows.
A stale present=false witness state is blocked by default.
The record writer creates records/latest/events ledger files.
The existing Form witness receipt contract remains 16777215 four-way.
e2e_validation.summary: The established floor is a real local carrier command for witness oracle emission ledger records. Remaining gaps are service installation and full model-backed STT/vision oracle labels.
